snippet.title: T. Danny - FASZAGYEREK (feat. Curtis)
snippet.description:
Zene: LehoLegacy
Szöveg: T. Danny, Curtis
Gitár: Aranyosi Norbert
Felvétel | Mix | Master: LehoLegacy

Operatőr | Vágó: Nagy Bence
https://www.instagram.com/nagybence_/
Rendező: T. Danny, Nagy Bence, Miskovits Marci
VFX: Nagy Endre
Project Manager: Sticza Gergő
Tánc: R3d One
https://instagram.com/r3doneofficial?igshid=1jwrssrgyk1tq

T. DANNY
Management: +36 70 427 7431
tdannymusic@gmail.com
https://www.instagram.com/tdanny_official/
https://m.facebook.com/tdannyofficial/

CURTIS
curtisshow0@gmail.com
https://www.instagram.com/curtis4ker/
https://www.facebook.com/Curtis4ker/

Külön köszönet:

Bácsfalvi Tamás, Sticza Gergő, Players Room, Red Bull


Szöveg:


Én fasza gyerek vagyok, azt mondják nekem a spanok, túl makacs vagyok, de ilyen ez a
Vér, megyek az utamon, azt hogy mit hoz, nem tudhatom, szerintük ez veszélyes lehet, de
Én senkire nem hallgattam,
Amit kaptam, én is mindig azt adtam,
Fent maradok, dolgozok még hajnalban,
Az Ördög folyton itt liheg a sarkamban


T. DANNY 

Én nem mondok soha sorry-t,
Letépem a láncomat magamról, hogyha szorít,
Rámegyek és zsákolok, játszom itt a Kobe-t, 
Én is csak 8 után érkezem meg, mint a Covid,
Az emberek behálóznak sajátnak, tiszta wifi, 
Megszoktam, hogy másoknak az álmaim a sci-fi,
Kimásztam már a sárból, onnan jöttem ide, szivi,
Az akkordokat vakon fogom le úgy, mint a Stevie,
Nekem azt kamázzák a zenémben, hogy eredeti,
Előfordul, hogy valaki, pont nem szereti,
Mennyi munkám van ebben, ezt sok elfeledi,
Folyton célkeresztben vagyok, John F. Kennedy,
Éjjel a csinálom a pénzt a cimborákkal,
Lassan házat veszek, végeztem a kisszobával,
Nem kérjük a kommentjeidet a piszkos száddal,
Kitörölheted a seggedet a diplomáddal


Én fasza gyerek vagyok, azt mondják nekem a spanok, túl makacs vagyok, de ilyen ez a
Vér, megyek az utamon, azt hogy mit hoz, nem tudhatom, szerintük ez veszélyes lehet, de
Én senkire nem hallgattam,
Amit kaptam, én is mindig azt adtam,
Fent maradok, dolgozok még hajnalban,
A Ördög folyton itt liheg a sarkamban


CURTIS

C4, megkoronázott hip-hop Maradona,
Hiába kértek kisgyerekként, nem hallgattam a szépszóra,
Rajtam a mezem, amíg fenn vannak a kezek,
Én a Kempinski helyett inkább a telepen leszek,
Árnyékos oldal, ahol megszokott a káosz,
Rapzene a híd, tudod, minden boldogsághoz,
Mert itt nincsen Crips, se Bloods, nem lettem bandatag,
Túsznak leszel jó, ne hidd, hogy nagyba vagy,
Faszagyerek voltam, vagyok és az maradok,
Csak az első osztály, nem utazok a fapadon,
Velem a csapatom és folyhat a Chivas,
Magamnak zenéltem mindig, leszarom, ki csipáz,
Stúdióba be, itt rap zene lesz életfogytig,
Hígult a szakma, a műfaj romlik,
Fain vagyok egy bizonyos pontig,
Kamu-celeb-szajhák, mind forintos prostik


Én fasza gyerek vagyok, azt mondják nekem a spanok, túl makacs vagyok, de ilyen ez a
Vér, megyek az utamon, azt hogy mit hoz, nem tudhatom, szerintük ez veszélyes lehet, de
Én senkire nem hallgattam,
Amit kaptam, én is mindig azt adtam,
Fent maradok, dolgozok még hajnalban,
A Ördög folyton itt liheg a sarkamban

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

localized.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
localized.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

snippet.title: Audi RS6 Avant TEST: Rodinná beštia, z ktorej lezie šialený zvuk 😜
snippet.description:
Nové Audi RS6 Avant určite nie je dokonalým športovým  autom, ale rozhodne jedným z tých, ktoré najlepšie spája extrémnu dynamiku s rodinou a praktickým využitím kombíka. Priznám sa, že asi najviac ma prekvapilo, aký zvuk lezie z tohto auta na videu, pretože počas nakrúcania v interiéri som z neho až taký silný zážitok nemal. Odfukovanie turba, počutelné sanie a do toho ešte brblajúci výfuk. Veľmi mi to pripomenulo legendárne Audi Quattro. Všetko ostatné zaznelo vo videu. Prajem príjemné pozeranie 😉

kamera: Pavel Briatka
strih: Ján Johno Gajdoš 

Audi testy a prvé jazdy: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLSUpd6SrbI9UFhwV8_T3NpSGNrYKquTTE

Odoberajte Autožurnál - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCdN1w6XRSXkuzrMu_wJgJRQ?sub_confirmation=1

Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/autozurnal
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/casopis.web.autozurnal
Web - https://autozurnal.ta3.com/
http://www.autozurnal.com

#audiRS6 #test

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go sub to Perogi with Scammer Payback too- 
https://youtube.com/c/ScammerPayback

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: Imagine Dragons - Follow You (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Listen to Follow You + Cutthroat, out now: https://smarturl.it/FollowYouCutthroat​​

Directed by Matt Eastin

Shop Imagine Dragons: http://smarturl.it/ImagineDragonsShop​​​
Sign up for email updates: http://smarturl.it/ID_Email​​​
Listen to Imagine Dragons on Spotify: http://smarturl.it/ID_Discography​​​

Follow Imagine Dragons:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ImagineDragons
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Imaginedragons​​​
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/imaginedragons
YouTube: https://youtube.com/imaginedragons​​
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@imaginedragons​

Lyrics:

You know I got your number number all night
I’m always on your team, I got your back alright
Taking those taking those losses if it treats you right
I want to put you into the spotlight
If the world would only know what you’ve been holding back
Heart attacks every night
Oh you know it’s not right

I’ll follow you way down wherever you may go
I’ll follow you way down to your deepest low
I’ll always be around wherever life takes you
You know I’ll follow you

Call you up, you’ve been cryin’ cryin’ all night
You’re only disappointed in yourself alright
Taking those taking those losses if it treats you right
I wanna take you into the sunlight
If the world would only know what you’ve been holding back
Heart attacks every night
Oh you know it’s not right

I’ll follow you way down wherever you may go
I’ll follow you way down to your deepest low
I’ll always be around wherever life takes you
You know I’ll follow you
You know I’ll follow you
Wherever life takes you, you know I’ll follow you

You're not the type to give yourself enough love
She live her life, hand in a tight glove
I wish that I could fix it, I could fix it for you
But instead I’ll be right here comin’ through
(Right here, comin’ through)

I’ll follow you way down wherever you may go
I’ll follow you way down to your deepest low
I’ll always be around wherever life takes you
You know I’ll follow you
You know I’ll follow you
Wherever life takes you, you know I’ll follow you

Music video by Imagine Dragons performing Follow You. © 2021 KIDinaKORNER/Interscope Records

http://vevo.ly/BTdWPP

snippet.title: 5 minutes from death : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I knew that what I’d been looking for, I hadn’t found yet. But what I had been looking for was not in the form of a drug.”
Demi and her closest confidants give a firsthand account of the aftermath of the overdose as she wakes up in the hospital after being minutes away from death.

Episode 3 available March 30 @ 12p PT

Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

ko.title: 죽기 5분 전 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
“제가 찾던 걸 아직 찾지 못했다는 걸 알았어요. 하지만 제가 찾던 건 약물이 아니었죠"
데미와 가장 가까운 사람들이 생사를 가른 몇 분 후 데미가 병원에서 깨어나고 약물 복용에 따른 결과를 직접 본 일을 털어놓는다.

도움받을 곳:

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
전국 성폭력 핫라인
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

de.title: Dem Tode nah : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
"Ich wusste, ich hatte noch nicht gefunden, wonach ich suchte. Aber ich suchte nicht nach Drogen."

Demi und ihre engsten Vertrauten erzählen aus erster Hand von der Zeit nach der Überdosis, als sie im Krankenhaus aufwachte, nachdem sie dem Tod knapp entronnen war.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Anlaufstelle bei sexueller Gewalt
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

fr.title: À 5 minutes de la mort : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
“Je savais que je n'avais pas encore trouvé ce que je cherchais. Mais la réponse n'était pas dans la drogue." 


Demi et ses plus proches confidents font le compte-rendu des conséquences de l'overdose à son réveil à l'hôpital, après être passée à quelques minutes de la mort.

Ressources :
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Hotline National Sexual Assault
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.

id.title: 5 Menit dari Kematian : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku sudah mengetahui apa yang aku cari selama ini, tetapi aku belum menemukannya. Namun, hal yang kucari selama ini bukan dalam bentuk obat.”

Demi dan orang kepercayaan terdekatnya menceritakan secara langsung akibat dari peristiwa overdesis ketika dia bangun di rumah sakit setelah beberapa menit nyaris mati.

Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Saluran siaga Serangan Seksual Nasional
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

es-419.title: A 5 minutos de la muerte : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Sabía que lo que estaba buscando no lo había encontrado todavía. Pero lo que estaba buscando no era una droga".
Demi y sus seres queridos relatan en primera persona las secuelas de la sobredosis cuando se despierta en el hospital tras haber estado a minutos de la muerte.

EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I crossed a line I’d never crossed in addiction.” 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

id.title: Kehilangan Kendali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku melewati batas yang tak pernah aku lewati karena kecanduan.”

Di bagian I dari serial dokumenter yang tak kenal takut ini, Demi Lovato, bersama keluarga dan teman-temannya, terus terang terbuka untuk pertama kali tentang apa yang menuntunnya pada overdosis yang nyaris mematikan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

de.title: Kontrollverlust : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
“Ich überschritt in der Sucht eine Grenze wie nie zuvor.“

Im ersten Teil dieser furchtlosen Dokuserie erzählen Demi Lovato und ihre Familie und Freunde zum ersten Mal unverblümt, was zu ihrer beinahe tödlichen Überdosis führte.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle der National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (auch Click-to-Chat-Nachrichten)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

snippet.title: Novinár Nicholson: OĽaNO je nacizmus jedného človeka
snippet.description:
Hosťom rozhovoru je investigatívny novinár Tom Nicholson. Pred 3 rokmi odišiel zo Slovenska, ale situáciu tu stále sleduje. Od Matoviča čakal pred rokom viac a hovorí, že to nie je ten typ človeka, ktorý vie viesť vládu v ťažkej situácii. Aké má s Matovičom osobné skúsenosti? Nicholson hovorí o zážitkoch so spisom Gorila. 
Aký má investigatívny novinár Nicholson názor na súčasnú situáciu so zatýkaním sudcov a riešeniu korupčných obvinení? Hovorí, že je ľahšie ísť proti Gašparovcom či Kočnerovcom, ako proti vládnemu establišmentu. Nicholson vraví, že  každý politik si chráni vlastnú kožu a chýba tu odvaha. 
Ako sa pozerá na Slovensko z Kanady a prečo odišiel? Ako podľa neho pristupujú k moci rôzne vlády od Smeru až po Matoviča? Koho by Nicholson volil a ktoré strany sú podľa neho dôveryhodné? Kriticky hovorí o strane Smer Rodina a o Borisovi Kollárovi. O Matovičovi hovorí ako o nacizme jedného človeka. To všetko a oveľa viac sa dozvieš v Startitup Diskunom Klube. 

Moderuje Šimon Žďárský: https://www.instagram.com/simonzdarsky/
 
#politika #investigatívnyNovinár #TomNicholson

👍 Vďaka za odber! 

💻 Čítaj náš web: https://www.startitup.sk
📱 Sleduj náš Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/startitup_sk
⌨️ A lajkuj Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/startitupcommunity

📩 Ak máš návrhy na spolupráce, prípadne tipy na videá: video@startitup.sk

snippet.title: TÝDENNÍ VLOG #56 | Naše úplně běžné dny
snippet.description:
Naše dny jsou teď už hodně stejné. S covidem a Nicole postupujícím těhotenstvím se dny zpomalily a omezily na home office. U Lucky je veselo díky  Emičce, ale s omezeným pohybem se také nedá moc aktivit vymyslet.  Tak jak tyhle naše dny probíhají? No, docela běžně. Koukněte  na nový vlog :)

Podcast o porodu: http://www.acupofstyle.com/2021/03/46-se-segrou-o-lucky-porodu-jeho.html

Naše diáře, kolekci oblečení a značku MG najdeš na našem e-shopu http://shop.acupofstyle.com/

Dál můžeš sledovat:
Náš blog - http://www.acupofstyle.com  
Lucky Instagram - http://instagram.com/luciegranova
Nicole Instagram - http://instagram.com/nicole_e
A cup of Style Instagram - http://instagram.com/acupofstyle
Mamky Instagram - http://instagram.com/e_eva
MG Instagram - http://instagram.com/mg_czsk
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/acupofstyle.cz/

Hudbuu ve videu používáme z hudební banky Epidemic Sound

Natáčíme foťákem Olympus OM-D EM5 Mark II
Stříháme v Adobe Premiere
Toto video stříhala Lucie Hecht

Kdo jsme?
Jsme dvě sestry a nejlepší kamarádky zároveň, Lucka (28) a Nicole (25). Již před více jak desetiletím jsme se vrhly do světa blogování. Přes deníček, grafiku a celebrity, o kterých jsme psaly dřív, jsme se propracovaly až k A Cup of Style - blogu o módě, nás, našem životě, zážitcích a názorech. Blog jsme založily v prosinci 2009. Hodně nás toho naučil a společně s námi se měnil a vyvíjel, až se dostal do aktuální podoby, ve které ho právě vidíte. Na blog promítáme svůj život. Co děláme, co nás baví, kam jezdíme a co nosíme nebo používáme. Snažíme se na naše čtenáře přenášet pozitivní energii a třeba i trochu motivace a hlavně - chceme, aby je to tu bavilo a cítili se jako doma.

A Cup of Style už není jen blog. Postupně se vyvinul v YouTube videa, podcasty a také vlastní značku. Můžete znát naše diáře, které vydáváme s nakladatelstvím Booklab,  a pustily jsme se i do vlastní kolekce oblečení a papírnictví. Na našem e-shopu http://shop.acupofstyle.com najdete tohle všechno a navíc ještě značku zdravých dobrot MG, kterou jsme založily společně s nutriční terapeutkou Markétou Gajdošovou. Pokud vás zajímá zdravé a dobré jídlo, mohla by vás zajímat i kuchařka Cesta k opravdovému jídlu. Tu napsala Markét spolu s naší mamkou, Evou Ehrenbergerovou. Je to docela propletené, co?

Baví nás posouvat své hranice, vymýšlet nové projekty a realizovat nápady. Teď se ale ještě víc těšíme na své nové životní role - role maminek. I tohle nám nakonec náhodou vyšlo tak, že se do nové etapy pouštíme jen pár měsíců po sobě.

----------------------------------------­­--------------------------------------

Často pokládané otázky na nás!
Jste sestry? 
Ano, Nicole se světlejšími vlasy je o dva a půl roku mladší, než Lucka.

Co jste studovaly?
Obě jsme vystudovaly Marketingovou komunikaci a PR. Lucka na VŠFS, Nicole na FSV UK.

Jaký máte foťák? 
Většina fotek na blogu je focena na Olympus OM-D EM5 Mark II, na něj natáčíme i naše vlogy. Některé záběry a fotky jsou na iPhone.

Jaké používáte programy? 
Fotky upravujeme v programu Adobe Lightroom a videa stříháme v Adobe Premiere.

----------------------------------------­­--------------------------------------

Nejlepší způsob, jak nás můžete kontaktovat je na acupofstyle@gmail.com

Ano, Nicole se světlejšími vlasy je o dva a půl roku mladší, než Lucka.

Co jste studovaly?
Obě jsme vystudovaly Marketingovou komunikaci a PR. Lucka na VŠFS, Nicole na FSV UK.

Jaký máte foťák? 
Většina fotek na blogu je focena na Olympus OM-D EM5 Mark II, na něj natáčíme i naše vlogy. Některé záběry a fotky jsou na iPhone.

Jaké používáte programy? 
Fotky upravujeme v programu Adobe Lightroom a videa stříháme v Adobe Premiere.

----------------------------------------­­--------------------------------------

Nejlepší způsob, jak nás můžete kontaktovat je na acupofstyle@gmail.com

snippet.title: Robert Fico: Matovičova vláda má za rok vládnutia viac káuz ako my za 10 rokov
snippet.description:
Hosťom rozhovoru je bývalý predseda vlády Slovenskej republiky a predseda SMER-SD Robert Fico. Ako vníma osobu a prácu Jána Kuciaka 3 roky po jeho vražde? Bolo podľa neho jeho rozhodnutie o rekonštrukcii vlády a vytiahnutie Petra Pellegriniho na post predsedu vlády správne? Urobil by teraz niečo inak? 
Ako vidí bývalý premiér Fico úradovanie súčasného premiéra Matoviča? Hovorí, že za prvý rok má táto vláda na konte viac káuz ako Ficova vláda za 10 rokov. O ženách v politike hovorí, že už nie sú chráneným druhom. Priznáva, že sa pozná s obvineným Norbertom Bödörom a dodáva, že s právnikom a podnikateľom Zoroslavom Kollárom sa naopak nepozná. To všetko a oveľa viac ti prináša Startitup Diskusný Klub.

Moderuje Šimon Žďárský: https://www.instagram.com/simonzdarsky/

Robert Fico: https://www.instagram.com/robert.fico/

#RobertFico #rozhovor #politika

👍 Vďaka za odber! 

💻 Čítaj náš web: https://www.startitup.sk
📱 Sleduj náš Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/startitup_sk
⌨️ A lajkuj Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/startitupcommunity

📩 Ak máš návrhy na spolupráce, prípadne tipy na videá: video@startitup.sk 

▶️ Startitup - Robíme to inak

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
Music’s Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhené Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, säje, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); säje for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: Miley Cyrus - Angels Like You (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Miley’s New Album Plastic Hearts is Available Now: https://mileyl.ink/PlasticHearts
 
View merch at Miley’s official store now! https://smarturl.it/MileyStore?iQid=yt

Site: http://www.mileycyrus.com

LYRICS

Every word in poetry 
Won’t call me by name, only baby 
The more that you give the less that I 
Need everyone says I look happy 
When it feels right

I know that you’re wrong for me

I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

(La La la)
I’m everything they said I would be

I’ll put you down slow
Love you goodbye 
before you let go, just one more time

pretend that it’s fine
A little more hurt won’t kill you 
tonight mama says you don’t look happy 
Close your eyes 

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

Directed By Alana O’Herlihy & Miley Cyrus
DOP: Kevin Hayden
Editor: Alana O’Herlihy

On-set Production: Eva Evans; Camera Operator: Yuya Kudo;
Post Production: Louise Mérat at Streeters

snippet.title: 10 MIN BUBBLE BUTT - Glute Bridge Burnout / no squats, no jumps, knee-friendly I with Equipment
snippet.description:
lay down on the floor & set your booty on fire ♥︎ low-impact, no squats, no lunges or jumps - but very efficient! / Werbung

Can I fill 10min with ONLY Glute Bridges? HELL YES. 
We isolate the butt muscles & train them without using a lot of thigh strength. This way we can grow our booty, not the legs :)  

You will like this workout, if you...
- like glute bridges :D we do them in ALL kinds of variations today! 
- want to grow your bubble butt 
- need a routine to ACTIVATE your glutes in the beginning of your leg day. This makes sure you use them properly during all the exercises following afterwards (squats, ..) 
- want to END your leg day with a BANG and totally kill your booty :D 
- have bad joints or knee pain 
- don't feel like jumping or sweating. Everything is down on the floor :)

__

Equipment: 

▸ I am using a 10kg / 22 lbs dumbbell. Please choose a weight that feels good for you. 
Weights help us to increase the intensity of a workout, build rounder muscles (booty alarm) and make us stronger! 

Your home-made weight: 
1. Take a bag 
2. Search for dense + heavy food in your kitchen. For example: packs of flour, rice, oats, etc. 
3. You can easily put 6 to 10 packs into one bag. That makes 6 to 10 kg :) 

▸ I also added a resistance band. This is definitely helpful to put more focus on the booty. I can especially recommend it, if you want to target the sides of your butt. In case you don't have a booty band yet - don't worry! You can still do this workout :)

__

▸ you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min and Beginner Friendly combinations. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

➞ Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
➞ Food Account http://www.instagram.com/pamgoesnuts/

▸ my Pam App ♥︎ Free workout plans, tips & recipes: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 

__
 
Business Contact:
pamela_reif@icloud.com

__
Music by Epidemicsounds.com

Disclaimer:
When joining me for this workout video, you need to take some precautions as your health and safety is the most important. To avoid any injury or harm, you need to check your health with your doctor before exercising. By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. Pamela Reif will not be responsible or liable for any injury or harm you sustain as a result of this video.

snippet.description:
Richard Sulík už viac nevydrží. Zatiaľ čo sa šéf liberálov lúči s ministrami na vláde, hovorí, že OĽANO chce vládnuť s fašistami. Premiér je stále ticho. Je to koniec štvorkoalície? Alebo je ešte možnosť, že sa lídri vládnych strán dohodnú? Čaká nás parlamentná kríza a predčasné voľby? Braňo Závodský sa rozprával s predsedom strany SaS Richardom Sulíkom.

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: Burai km. T.Danny x G.w.M x KKevin - Káosz
snippet.description:
Stream:  https://backl.ink/145523865
BOTB Management és Booking: +36 70 771 6772 

Zene: Burai Krisztián
Gitár: Tóth Dávid
Billentyűk: Bader Janika
Dalszöveg: Burai, T.Danny, G.w.M, KKevin

Burai:
https://www.instagram.com/buraionthebeat_hivatalos/
https://www.facebook.com/buraikrisztianhivatalos

T.Danny:
https://www.instagram.com/tdanny_official/
https://www.facebook.com/tdannyofficial

G.w.M:
https://www.instagram.com/gwmmusic/
https://www.facebook.com/GWMMUSIC

KKevin:
https://www.instagram.com/kkevin.official/
https://www.facebook.com/kkevin.official

A legjobb táncos: Hanzely Dániel 'Hanzi'

A videóklippet az Antemius Media készítette.
https://www.facebook.com/AntemiusMedia​
https://www.instagram.com/antemiusmedia_slink/

Executive Producer : Stipkovics Mátyás

Supervisor & Cover Art: Bácskai Róbert

Dalszöveg:

T.Danny:
Gyere ide nálam van az amit keresel
Szívtelen vagyok hidd el mindegy minek nevezel
Akarom a tortát, nem csak a fele kell
Te vagy az első olyan aki visszafelesel
Egy-két és há, belemelegedek
Megkérsz és már Veled belemegyek
Sok rossz lány kell, ezerrel menetelek
Jól mondták neked ez egy fenegyerek

Burai:
Rossznak látszom, ma Veled játszom
Igazad van rossz vér vagyok
Megiszok mindent, limit az nincsen 
Ebből lesznek még bajok
Kikészülnek bárhol járunk
Vagány vagy, de mostmár nem
Hagyd a gádzsidat most nálunk
Itt egy vodka húzz innen

Refrén: 
Túl nagy káosz lesz
Tőlünk pont elvárják ezt
Ha lemaradsz hát vesztesz
Bébi gyere már

Túl nagy káosz lesz
Tőlünk pont elvárják ezt
Ha lemaradsz hát vesztesz
Jobb lesz, ha ma belekezdesz

T.Danny:
Én is elvesztem a kontrollomot olykor
Bocsi, de nem leszek ott melletted reggel 8-kor
Nyugi nem kell semmi komolyabbra gondolj
Inkább a nadrágomon még egyet gombolj
Ideje, hogy más szemmel láss
Írogatnak, de nem kell más
Tudom neked ma kell egy társ
Ez a nyelv bébi legendás

Túl nagy káosz lesz
Tőlünk pont elvárják ezt
Ha lemaradsz hát vesztesz
Bébi gyere már

Túl nagy káosz lesz
Tőlünk pont elvárják ezt
Ha lemaradsz hát vesztesz
Jobb lesz, ha ma belekezdesz

KKevin:
Megjöttünk, megfagyott a levegő
Chivashoz Coca Cola a keverő
Ez a brigád de menő
Négy latina szerető
Elromlott a fék, csöngessétek meg a szerelőt
Megfogok egy gádzsit mehet a vadászat
Gyere velem baba este hazaváglak
Miattam hazudnia kell a madarának
Az aranyásók az ásókkal kaparásznak
Megérkezünk együtt, berobban a csapat
Leszakad ma a lakat, elbaszunk minden vasat
Ez az életünk esténként sokat vétkezünk
Készüljetek ha érkezünk, reggel a nődnél ébredünk
Nekünk ez a védjegyünk ott vagyunk mindenben
Te is tudod titkon, de ismerd be
Rágombolnál ha kérném az ingemre?
Ilyet nem láttatok maximum fil-mek-ben

Túl nagy káosz lesz
Tőlünk pont elvárják ezt
Ha lemaradsz hát vesztesz
Bébi gyere már

Túl nagy káosz lesz
Tőlünk pont elvárják ezt
Ha lemaradsz hát vesztesz
Jobb lesz, ha ma belekezdesz

G.w.M:
Burai begurul egy AMG-ben
G.w.M M pakk, a csajod térdre megy
Évek óta vitatják hogy kinek mennyi van
Évente 300 hakni, azt jó van az
Nem felejtük honnan, de nem vágyunk vissza
A sikerünk titka, hogy a lelkünk tiszta
Nem vagyunk senkik, pedig azok voltunk
Az irigyek átka rajtunk áldásként landol

Kikérek egy kört hagy igyanak a pulyák
Ne feledd el faszos rajtad hányas az a kabát
Rombol a king kong
A vakerom gyilkol
Eredetik vagyunk velünk ezért nem bírtok cigány
Nekem papír a pénz, neked életcél
Nem azt nem adják ingyen, ne szenvedjél
A testvériség drága kincs
Burai testvérem ennek párja nincs

Túl nagy káosz lesz
Tőlünk pont elvárják ezt
Ha lemaradsz hát vesztesz
Bébi gyere már

Túl nagy káosz lesz
Tőlünk pont elvárják ezt
Ha lemaradsz hát vesztesz
Jobb lesz, ha ma belekezdesz

snippet.title: Toto som POVEDAŤ nemal!
snippet.description:
Toto som naozaj povedať nemal a dosť sa za to hanbím. Jedna meme stránka našla vo videu z roku 2016 úsek, z ktorého spravila meme no aaa nebolo to úplne v pohode. V tomto úseku som povedal otrasnú vetu a skôr ako sa to nafúkne a stane sa z toho niečo čo nikto z nás nechce aby sa stalo som si povedal, že to rozoberiem vo videjku #narovinu.

Zastav se na stramu pokecáme:
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/realmedojed
Streamovací kalendář:
Pondělí: 14:00-17:00
Středa: 14:00-17:00
Pátek: 14:00-17:00

Kde všude se dá najít Medojed?
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/realmedojed
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tenMedojed
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fakemedojed/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/medojed

Kdo jsem?
Nerd co má rád komiksy, filmy, anime, videohry, knihy a točení videí. Snažím se natočit alespoň 4 videa týdně, ale občas to nevyjde. 

F.A.Q.
Na natáčení používám Panasonic G7 + Sony FDR AX53.
Nekoukám na české youtubery takže neviděl/neznám.
Na natáčení používám zrcadlovku Canon EOS 700D.
Hraju hlavně na PC, ale mám i Nintendo Switch.
Narodil jsem se v roce 1990 spočítej si to.
Ne nemůžu mluvit míň sprostě.
Filmstalker je myšlen ironicky.
Stříhám v Adobe Premieru.
Filmstalker vychází 1 měsíčně.
Marvel nebo DC: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z2aETbrEcCo
#top10 #film 

FIlmy:
Umučení krista
Frozen
Zootropolis
Matrix
Thor
John Wick
Star Wars
Pán Prstenů
Čestné zmínky: Alien, Scream, Kmotr 2, Ex Machina
Lví Král

snippet.title: Duše K - tentokrát o Solfeggio frekvencích s Gabrielem Pospíšilem - 11.3.2021
snippet.description:
Gabriel Pospíšil je muzikant, ktorý sa 10 rokov dozadu začal zaoberať zvukmi a ladením nástrojov inak. Více o solfeggio frekvencích zde: https://uloz.to/file/cyDWgHtsTHWv/solfeggio-frekvence-pdf
Hľadal alternatívy a objavil solfeggio frekvencie, ktoré ho veľmi zaujali. Keďže je remeselne zručný, rozhodol sa vyrobiť nástroj a naladiť ho do týchto frekvencií. Postupným vývojom tento nástroj dopracoval do podoby dnešnej, čiže nástroj, na ktorom je možné koncertovať. Všetky tóny sú naladené v súvzťažnosti čísel 3, 6, 9, ktoré sú geometricko-matematickým základom stavby vesmíru ako posvätná geometria. Keďže aj naša bunka a genetika je vystavaná v tejto geometrii, zvuk takto ladený má veľký vplyv na ich aktiváciu a čistenie. Zaoberá sa individuálnou aj skupinovou zvukovou terapiou. Usporiadavá aj liečivé koncerty, na ktorých vystupuje ďalší muzikant Matej Rizman, ktorý hrá na rámové bubny a na fujary. Tento rok s nimi začína spievať speváčka z Bratislavy Lucia Piršelová, ktorá sa zaoberá unikátnym spevom, ktorý sa šíri sfericky tak, ako jeho hudobný nástroj vibrafón. Súčasťou mojich akcií sú aj prednášky na rôzne témy súvisiace s vibráciami, a všetkým čo z toho vyvstáva. Najzákladnejší tón celého nástroja 528 Hz vyrába samostatne. 
Více zde: https://www.facebook.com/T%C3%B3ny-%C5%BEivota-1388991604680982/

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry’s Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won’t be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

snippet.title: 10 MIN BEST OF HIIT - a compilation of the best parts of my HIIT workouts - INTENSE I Pamela Reif
snippet.description:
SUCH A KILLER ROUTINE - but you won't notice while you're training (because it's also kind of happy). I was dripping sweat after only 1 round! ♥︎ Cardio is fun today! / Werbung

omg I am so exciteeeeeed! 
A combination of your (and my :D) favorite parts of the 15min Happy Dance, 12min Happy Sweat, 12min Happy Cardio & 10min R&B Dance. Basically, it's mostly about the last, super high energy songs! The parts that we put all our energy into, that we sweat it all out & feel so happy afterwards. 

This is my favorite HIIT workout ever now. It's SUPER DUPER intense, will kick your ass, but it will also kick the 12min Happy Cardio from it's throne haha. At least for my personal taste. Let me know what you think!!! 

▸ burn lots of calories 
▸ improve your endurance 
▸ main muscles worked: thighs, butt, abs (from all the high knees)
▸ boost your mood & just be happyyyyy

PS: thanks for helping me decide about the workout parts on Insta Stories! Always love to do whatever you like best :))

__

Apart form the good mood & I can also guarantee a serious number of burned calories here. 

▸ I burned 90kcal in those 10min (which is a loooooot). 
Depending on your height, weight and fitness level this might vary between 80-160kcal. 

__

▸ you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min and Beginner Friendly combinations. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

➞ Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

▸ my Pam App ♥︎ Free workout plans, recipes & tips: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 

__
 
I update my workout playlist weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. ♥︎
http://wmg.click/GetActive

1. David Guetta feat. Nicki Minaj, Bebe Rexha & Afrojack - Hey Mama  
2. Sam And The Womp - Bom Bom   
3. Parx feat. Nonô - Feel Right Now
4. Ciara - Level Up 

__

Business Contact:
pamela_reif@icloud.com

__
unterstützt durch Warner Music Germany

Disclaimer:
When joining me for this workout video, you need to take some precautions as your health and safety is the most important. To avoid any injury or harm, you need to check your health with your doctor before exercising. By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. Pamela Reif will not be responsible or liable for any injury or harm you sustain as a result of this video.

snippet.title: Hercai 62. Bölüm
snippet.description:
62. Bölüm Özeti 🦋

Dilşah, Reyyan’ın Miran’dan gizlediği gerçeği öğrenmiş, elindeki belgeyi Reyyan’a koz olarak kullanmaya başlamıştır. Fakat Reyyan ne olursa olsun kararından dönmeyecektir. Fakat Umut’a kendini unutturmayacak anlar bırakmak istemektedir.  Düşmanlık ve kin yüzünden bir en basit mutluluklardan bile eksik kaldıklarını fark eder. Doğru dürüst bir düğün resimleri bile yoktur oğullarına bırakacakları. Miran, sevdiği kadının aldığı bu önemli karardan bihaber, oğlu ve karısının içlerinde hiçbir şeyin uhde kalmaması için harekete geçer. Yarım kalan ne varsa tamamlayacaktır. En başta da düğün. Bu büyük sevdayı, bir düğünle taçlandıracaklardır. Onlar mutluluklarını tamamlayacak bir düğünün hazırlıkları için uğraşırken, Azat ve Gönül’de aşkları ve hayatları adına çok önemli bir karar alırlar.  Aldıkları bu karar, küllenmiş kinlerin yeniden alevlenmesine neden olacak, Reyyan ve Miran’ın barış ve huzur için inşa ettikleri yeni ortamı çatırdatmaya başlayacaktır.  

Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için bu kanala katılın:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join

“İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi”

Yapımcılığını, Mia Yapım Banu Akdeniz üstlendiği, "İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi" mottosuyla yola çıkan Hercai'nin başrollerini Akın Akınözü, Ebru Şahin, Gülçin Santıroğlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Özer, Oya Unustası, Tansu Taşanlar ve  İlay Erkök paylaşıyor.

Hercai YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://bit.ly/2vwmORD

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

Hercai Web Sayfası; https://goo.gl/ziLDeQ

Bu büyük sevdayı, bir düğünle taçlandıracaklardır. Onlar mutluluklarını tamamlayacak bir düğünün hazırlıkları için uğraşırken, Azat ve Gönül’de aşkları ve hayatları adına çok önemli bir karar alırlar.  Aldıkları bu karar, küllenmiş kinlerin yeniden alevlenmesine neden olacak, Reyyan ve Miran’ın barış ve huzur için inşa ettikleri yeni ortamı çatırdatmaya başlayacaktır.  

Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için bu kanala katılın:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join

“İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi”

Yapımcılığını, Mia Yapım Banu Akdeniz üstlendiği, "İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi" mottosuyla yola çıkan Hercai'nin başrollerini Akın Akınözü, Ebru Şahin, Gülçin Santıroğlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Özer, Oya Unustası, Tansu Taşanlar ve  İlay Erkök paylaşıyor.

Hercai YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://bit.ly/2vwmORD

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

Hercai Web Sayfası; https://goo.gl/ziLDeQ

snippet.title: What if the World turned to Gold? - The Gold Apocalypse
snippet.description:
The Map of Evolution and other sciency posters, researched and designed with love, are now available on the kurzgesagt shop. 
Your purchase will support us directly and keep our videos free for everyone. 
►► https://shop.kurzgesagt.org
(Worldwide Shipping Available)

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesgoldapocalypse/

Let us explore the scientific mystery of what would happen to you, if Earth suddenly turned into gold! The “Midaspocalypse”, based on the ancient tale of King Midas who was cursed so everything he touched turned into gold.

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: 10 MIN AB LINES WORKOUT - efficient for middle, side & upper abs / No Equipment I Pamela Reif
snippet.description:
want to get the famous "11 line" abs? good, let's train our entire core ♥︎  / Werbung 

We (hopefully) all know: you will not magically get ab lines & lose all your belly fat by doing 5 crunches. I wish it was that easy haha. But let's make sure our lines are readyyyy below the "soft pillows". Being well prepared is always beneficial, we are ready for the moment we get to see those muscles. 

To see, ab lines you need to: 
▸ have strong ab muscles. Especially obliques (the sides), but also upper, lower and middle abs. It's basically only possible with a combination out of all areas. Think about runway models: they are often super duper skinny but don't have visible abs. So yes, we all have abs - but IT IS a matter of training them & making them pop out.
▸ have low body fat storages at your core. Everybody stores weight at different areas, so some people don't even need to have a super low body fat percentage to see those lines! If you naturally store more fat around your stomach though, you will need to be more shredded.  
▸ sleep well & don't stress so much: why? Stress increases the hormone cortisol, which supports fat storages around your belly. 

PS: enjoy the view & the sunset! ♥︎

__

No Equipment necessary, no breaks and not much space needed :) If you need a break though - take it! Just don't quit! 

The video is in full length which means you can just follow whatever I’m doing 30s for each exercise. 
__

▸ you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min and Beginner Friendly combinations. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

➞ Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
➞ Food Account http://www.instagram.com/pamgoesnuts/

▸ use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

__
 
▸ You can always find ALL SONGS in my workout playlist. I update it weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. ♥︎

2. Tobtok, Milwin & Alfie Cridland - New Levels, feat. Mila Falls 2:35 - 5:06

4. Christopher - Fall So Hard 7:37 - 10:40

In this episode you will learn various tips and tricks for woodworking, carpentry and joinery. Hopefully these can then inspire you and increase your skills for when you might need to use them in the near future.

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:

Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: LOLLYMÁNIE - Potkaly jsme ufona v Brně😂
snippet.description:
Písnička stará 5 let, patří mezi vaše nejoblíbenější a tancovat na ní umí skoro každý z vás😍🎵 Jak je možné, že jsme na ní doteď nenatočily videoklip?🙄 To nevíme, ale vyjely jsme si na výlet do planetária a hvězdárny v Brně, abychom to napravily...a nakonec jsme i ufona potkaly😂😁


Odkazy na naše oficiální sociální sítě:
Facebook: www.facebook.com/LollipopzOfficial 
Instagram: www.instagram.com/LollipopzOfficial 

Vstupenky na na naše koncerty si můžete koupit v síti Ticketportal. Všechny akce, které se kvůli vládním opatřením neuskuteční budou přesunuté na nový termín:

snippet.description:
© 2021 Gold Soul Records
Fellépésszervezés: ericeo90@gmail.com
Rico Instagram (http://bit.ly/2eGaOi8​)
Miss Mood Instagram (http://bit.ly/2fKtbVC​)
GOLD SOUL WEBSHOP: http://www.goldsoul.hu​
Rico Facebook (https://bit.ly/2GUwB3J​)
Miss Mood Facebook (http://bit.ly/2vpb68P​)
T.Danny Instagram (https://bit.ly/2PbpjCA)
T.Danny Facebook (https://bit.ly/3pU21xN) 

DIGITÁLIS STORE-okban: https://backl.ink/144950646
(iTunes, Apple Music, Deezer, Spotify, Google Play, Amazon) 

Rico x Miss Mood - 12 hónap (ft. T.Danny) (Official Music Video)
Lyrics, Rap, Vocal by Rico, Miss Mood, T.Danny
Produced, Mix & Master by SMiTHMUSiX (https://bit.ly/2xgxUdH​)
Recorded @ Kinx Studio (2021) (http://bit.ly/2w1tvKq​)
Írta és rendezte: Vaszil Erik, Mező Dorottya  
Kamera: LehoDanel, Horváth Csaba
Vágás, VFX: LeHoDaNel (@leholegacy), Horváth Csaba 
Fényelés: Horváth Csaba (https://bit.ly/2IR4QiB​)
Smink: Miss Mood MakeUp (http://bit.ly/2vLIUy1​)

Rico

Nagy levegő beszív és a szív újra kitár
Nem véletlenül sírdogál alattam a gitár
Nem vagyok jól, talán mert a lelkem nem meditál
Bár azt mondják, hogy ami nem megy azt erőltetni kár
De mostanában semmi motivációm csak játszom
Filmezek és agyalok, hogy mit keresek láncon
Elvették egy évemet és eggyel több a ráncom
A te szemedben sikeresnek látszom?
Túl magas a jéghegy és egy emberiség mássza
De meddig tarthat ennek az időszaknak a gyásza
Van e még a jövőnknek a pakliban egy ásza
Ami ezt a jelent végleg levadássza

Rico (Pre Hook)

Túl hosszú ez a 12 hónap
Reménykedem már, hogy bekopog a holnap
És hogy hamarosan ez a jég elolvad
De remélem te jól vagy... (Jól vagy?)

Miss Mood (Refrén)

Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Vár a világ
Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Hol vagy már?

T.Danny 

Túl sok, túl sok, túl sok, túl sok...
Volt ez az év
Zúzok, zúzok, zúzok, zúzok...
Elvisz a hév
Eltelt 12 hónap
Nem megyek sehova akkor se ha szólnak
Hogyha kérdezik hogy vagyok, mit mondjak
Egyre kevésbé tartom magamat jónak
Folyton itthon vagyok, de üres a kecó
Ülök a szobában nem csörög a teló
Épp messze járok nem köt le a meló
Be is vagyok zárva, ez így nem jó

Rico (Pre Hook)

Túl hosszú ez a 12 hónap
Reménykedem már, hogy bekopog a holnap
És hogy hamarosan ez a jég elolvad
De remélem te jól vagy... (Jól vagy?)

Miss Mood (Refrén)

Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Vár a világ
Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Hol vagy már?

Miss Mood (Bridge)

Mondd mikor lett jégből a világ
Miért nem jöhet fény az ablakon át
Ohh, látod e a remény sugarát
Én itt leszek és várok még rá

Miss Mood (Refrén)

Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Vár a világ
Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Hol vagy már?

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA’s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.
